overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character sailing a traditional Japanese boat toward a coastal village. The vessel moves through clear turquoise water toward a sandy beach lined with wooden docks and traditional Japanese buildings, eventually beaching on the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal approach with traditional Japanese village and wooden docks

agents.ego_description: steering the sailboat through shallow turquoise water toward the beach, standing at the stern

notable_agents.action: crew member standing at the bow of the boat facing forward

entered.detail: cluster of traditional wooden buildings with tiled roofs along the shoreline
large rocky outcrop formation rising from the water on the right side
vertical wooden posts sticking out of the water marking the approach to shore
sandy shoreline ahead with gentle slope leading up to the village
wooden dock structures and scaffolding along the left side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a smooth approach by sailboat toward a traditional Japanese coastal village. The camera follows from behind the character as the boat glides through crystal-clear turquoise water. Traditional wooden buildings line the left shore while a rocky cliff dominates the right. Wooden mooring posts and dock scaffolding become visible as the boat nears the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach landing area with driftwood and debris

events.description: boat transitions from floating in water to sliding onto the sandy beach
boat comes to a complete stop on the sand after beaching

agents.ego_description: beaching the boat on the sandy shore, the vessel slides to a halt on the sand

entered.detail: scattered logs, barrels, and wooden debris lying on the sand near the waterline

segments.scene_description: The boat beaches itself on the sandy shore, transitioning from water to land. The vessel slides onto the sand and comes to a stop among scattered wooden debris and logs. The traditional village buildings are now much closer on the left, while the rocky cliff recedes into the background on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open water toward a sandy shoreline, transitioning from a nautical approach to a land-based arrival. It begins behind the character as the sailboat glides through crystal-clear turquoise water, flanked by traditional wooden buildings on the left and a towering rocky cliff on the right. As the boat nears the beach, wooden mooring posts and dock scaffolding emerge from the water to frame the approach. The scene then shifts as the vessel slides from the sea onto the sandy shore, coming to a stop among scattered logs and wooden debris. Finally, the perspective settles on land, bringing the village buildings into close view while the distant cliff recedes into the background.
